testcase.name: testHello
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Response content expected:<hello : Gurum> but was:<hello : gurum> at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.fail(AssertionErrors.java:62) at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.assertEquals(AssertionErrors.java:129) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.ContentResultMatchers.lambda$string$1(ContentResultMatchers.java:148) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc$1.andExpect(MockMvc.java:212) at com.rubypaper.BoardControllerTest2.testHello(BoardControllerTest2.java:29)
